full_text:
Lady Xu 夫人徐
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Lady Xu (夫人徐)was born in Fuchun. Wife of Sun Quan, the Lord of Wu. Was a native of Fuchun in Wu Commandary. Lady Xu was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
